text:
There was a girl who loved baking cookies. With every moonflower blooming outside her window, she dreamed of chocolate chip mice.

One autumn evening, as she stirred the dough, she heard a soft squeaking. Peeping out her window, her eyes widened. There was a mouse with bright red cheeks. She couldn't speak to it. Instead, she poked some dough.

That night, she dreamt she taught Mister Mouse.

Every morning for weeks, she fed him some oatmeal. Eventually, he grew big and fuzzy. They danced around her kitchen. Mister Mouse would nibble her favorite cookies.

When Christmas came, they were hers. They lived happily ever after. She made him an ornament that night. His little face was decorated with glitter.

You see? That's a story. Did you know mice like chocolate chips?<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
